text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, goodness. Where are my manners? I'm sorry,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was up late last night sewing... I just got so
completely absorbed in my work...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...I feel like giving someone a big hug.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Could you come here for a second?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is swaying about, half-asleep. It
appears as though she didn't get enough rest.
